mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2.5% (CPIAUCSL) signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite CPIAUCSL > 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL signal tightening monetary policy amid inflation, creating headwinds for equity valuations and negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive in > 50% of instances where both FEDFUNDS > 4% and CPIAUCSL > 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in unemployment rate (UNRATE) signals tight labor markets, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 40% of instances where UNRATE declines > 0.5pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) indicate robust economic activity, driving corporate profits and positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 30% of instances with PAYEMS growth > 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) signal increased consumer confidence and demand, generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 50% of instances where HOUST increases > 5% monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production (INDPRO) reflects strong manufacturing activity, driving equity valuations and positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 40% of instances with INDPRO growth > 2% monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Declining real sales (RSAFS) indicate weak consumer demand, creating downward pressure on corporate revenues and negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive in > 50% of instances where RSAFS declines > 2% monthly.
